description: YAML closely mirrors BSV structure. L4-level explicit code snippets in knowledge.bsv.code. Compiler extracts code directly.
yaml_style: L4 code snippets: complete BSV source embedded in YAML knowledge fields
compiler_strategy: Direct extraction from knowledge.bsv.code → write to .bsv files
result: FPC=1.0 (3/3 compile), ID=1.186, simulation blocked by upstream test infrastructure

description: L2-L3 abstract YAML. YAML describes types/functions in natural language. LLM agent generates BSV from abstract descriptions.
yaml_style: L2-L3 level: natural language descriptions. No embedded BSV code.
compiler_strategy: Agent-based LLM generation: spawn agents to read YAML and generate BSV files
result: ID=0.43 (50.7% reduction from iter_001), but BSV generation from L2-L3 YAML stalled

description: Bypass Utils4Test dependency chain by creating standalone minimal testbenches. Real TPR/ZFPR measurement.
yaml_style: Using iter_001 generated BSV (L4-based), with standalone minimal testbenches
compiler_strategy: Workspace-based compilation with standalone testbenches. Each module tested in isolation.
result: FPC=1.0, TPR=1.0 (3/3), ZFPR=1.0 — first real ZFPR achievement

description: Two-Phase compiler with centralized type registry. Phase 1: 468 types extracted → types.bsv. Phase 2: 22 module BSV files generated. Scale to all 20 modules.
yaml_style: L4 code for T04-T22, L2-L3 YAML for T01-T03. Centralized types.yaml registry.
compiler_strategy: Two-Phase: Phase 1 (Types): extract types from all sources → types.bsv → Phase 2 (Modules): generate BSV from YAML. Parallel testing.
result: FPC=1.0 (22/22 compile). TPR/ZFPR=1.0 on 3/22 functionally-tested modules. 19/22 compile-only. ID=1.015.

description: Auto-generate meaningful standalone testbenches from YAML interface descriptions. Tests interface methods with simple stimuli. Expands ZFPR coverage from 3→6 modules by testing T04-T06 interfaces.
yaml_style: L4 code for T04-T22, L2-L3 for T01-T03. Added test_method section to YAML for testbench generation.
compiler_strategy: Three-Phase: Phase 1 (Types) → Phase 2 (Module BSV) → Phase 3 (Testbench generation from interface definitions). Parallel test execution with auto-generated testbenches.
